questions: What is the exact CLI change needed for Run 3?
How should --rating be made conditional based on --reply-to?

answers.answer: One targeted fix: make --rating conditional in comments-post.ts. When --reply-to is present, use getFlag (optional) for --rating. When --reply-to is absent, keep requireFlag (mandatory). Also conditionally include rating in the request body.
evidence: src/lib/flags.ts — getFlag returns string | undefined; requireFlag exits on missing

answers.answer: Read --reply-to FIRST (move from line 36 to before line 29). Then conditionally use getFlag vs requireFlag for --rating. Update body construction to only include rating when it has a value. Update output message for reply mode.
evidence: Server library-comment-service.ts:69-73 — rating required for top-level only

statement: CLI needs 1 targeted fix to comments-post.ts: make --rating conditional on --reply-to presence. Read --reply-to first, then conditionally use getFlag (optional) vs requireFlag (mandatory) for --rating. Update body construction and output message. Plan includes 5 required verification checks covering build, all command modes, and the specific reply-without-rating scenario.
